texto: Klaus: Oh, come on. Take a chance, Caroline. Talk to me. Come on, get to know me. I dare you.Caroline: Fine. So, what do you wanna talk about?Klaus: I wanna talk about you. (Caroline scoffs) Your hopes, your dreams. Everything you want in life.Caroline: (laughs) Just to be clear, I'm too smart to be seduced by you.Klaus: Well, that's why I like you!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Caroline Dries: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Klaus: Oh, come on. Take a chance, Caroline. Talk to me. Come on, get to know me. I dare you.Caro…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, cute, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e love.
